title: Add Author Section to README
description: Update the project's README.md file to include an 'Author' section with relevant author information.
details: Open the README.md file located at the root of the project. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section near the end (or in a logical position if a convention exists). Include the author's name and, if appropriate, contact information or links (e.g., GitHub profile, email). Ensure formatting matches the rest of the README and adheres to Markdown best practices.
test_strategy: Visually inspect the README.md file in a Markdown viewer to confirm the 'Author' section appears correctly, is formatted consistently, and contains accurate information. Optionally, have another team member review for clarity and completeness.
